items.proof_note: The repository carries the canonical MCP registry manifest pinned to the official registry schema.
items.notes: Canonical MCP discovery packet anchored to the server entry point and typed registry manifest.

items.proof_note: Public npm package listing for the published MCP server package.
items.notes: Primary install path for MCP clients that load the server directly from npm.

items.proof_note: Registry-specific Glama submission metadata is versioned in the repo alongside the MCP package.
items.notes: Glama discovery metadata reuses the same MCP asset name and install path.

items.proof_note: PulseMCP submission metadata is committed in-repo as a dedicated registry packet.
items.notes: PulseMCP can discover the same MCP package through the checked-in registry descriptor.

items.proof_note: The published OpenClaw skill definition is the canonical registry submission artifact.
items.notes: OpenClaw skill registry surface anchored to the checked-in SKILL.md and documented install command.

items.proof_note: The same portable SKILL.md package is the submission artifact referenced for skills.sh discovery.
items.notes: Portable skill directory listing that maps directly back to the repo's canonical skill package.

items.proof_note: The portable skill package in the repository doubles as the askill.sh submission artifact.
items.notes: Secondary skill-index target using the same checked-in skill package and install instructions.
